infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoProof uses the camera to capture GPS-tagged field documentation photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoProof uses your location to embed GPS coordinates in field photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoProof accesses photos to generate documentation reports.

plugins.cameraPermission: GeoProof uses the camera to capture GPS-tagged field documentation photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoProof uses your location to embed GPS coordinates in field photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow GeoProof to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow GeoProof to save field documentation photos.

plugins.userTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you.
